revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:炭酸泉]]


and {{ill|Carbonated Springs|ja|炭酸泉|1=Carbonated Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbonated Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbonated Springs|qq=}} are similarly titled and I am unsure whether it makes sense to have the {{ill|Carbonated Springs|ja|炭酸泉|1=Carbonated Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbonated Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbonated Springs|qq=}} redirect when that refers to a possibly untranslateable Japanese linguistic distinction[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 12 March 2025 (UTC)|qq=}} 
'''Tansansen''' (炭酸泉, Carbonated Springs)
* Simple Carbonated Spring - Refer to {{ill|Carbon Dioxide Springs|ja|二酸化炭素泉|1=Carbon Dioxide Springs|1=Carbon Dioxide Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbon Dioxide Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Carbon Dioxide Springs|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Bicarbonate Spring|ja|炭酸水素塩泉|1=Bicarbonate springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate Spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate springs|qq=}} (Bicarbonate Earth Springs, Carbonated-Baking Soda Springs)
* Springs containing sulfur are referenced under {{ill|Sulfur Springs|ja|硫黄泉|1=Sulfur spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sulfur Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Sulfur spring|qq=}}.
* Carbonated-Saline Springs - Refer to {{ill|Brine spring|en|Brine spring|qid=Q11428612|lt=Brine spring|1=Brine spring}}.
* Carbonated Iron Springs - Refer to {{ill|Chalybeate|en|Chalybeate|qid=Q3046709|lt=Chalybeate springs|1=Chalybeate springs}}.

== See Also ==
* {{ill|Hot Spring Types|ja|泉質|1=Hot Spring Types|1=Hot Spring Types|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Types|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Types|qq=}}
* [[:en:Carbonic Acid|Carbonic Acid]] - {{ill|Carbonated water|en|Carbonated water|qid=Q264554|lt=Carbonated Water|1=Carbonated water}} - {{ill|Carbonation|en|Carbonation|qid=Q2139722|lt=Carbon Dioxide Saturation|1=Carbonation}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{Onsen-stub|qq=}}
{{Onsen|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|炭酸泉|version=85509138|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:炭酸泉]]
[[ja:泉質]]
